Operation 'bulkCheckEmails' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and appropriate. Description lacks critical details about what validation checks are performed on bulk emails and what the response contains. Original description only mentions plan limitations without explaining the actual validation capabilities or output format. Enhanced description clarifies that bulk validation performs the same comprehensive checks as single email validation, specifies the batch size limits by plan tier, and explicitly states that results are returned for each email. This helps AI agents understand the operation's full capabilities and plan requirements.

data.current_description: Validates multiple email addresses in a single request. Available on Pro Plus (up to 25 emails) and Enterprise Plus (up to 100 emails) plans only.
data.description_suggestion: Validates multiple email addresses in a single request, performing the same comprehensive checks as single email validation (syntax validation, MX record verification, SMTP existence checks, catch-all detection, role account detection, disposable and free provider filtering, typo suggestions, and deliverability scoring). Accepts up to 25 emails on Pro Plus plans and up to 100 emails on Enterprise Plus plans. Returns validation results and metadata for each email address in the batch.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and appropriate. Description lacks critical details about what validation checks are performed on bulk emails and what the response contains. Original description only mentions plan limitations without explaining the actual validation capabilities or output format. Enhanced description clarifies that bulk validation performs the same comprehensive checks as single email validation, specifies the batch size limits by plan tier, and explicitly states that results are returned for each email. This helps AI agents understand the operation's full capabilities and plan requirements.
